landing.heroDescription: Master daily routines with research-backed professional strategies, tailored for the ADHD brain.
landing.unlockDescription: Cognitive powers that turn overwhelming tasks into achievable victories.
landing.activateDescription: Use cognitive strategies to break task paralysis and conquer "mountain" tasks step by step.
landing.familySyncDescription: Collaborative goal-setting where the parent is the coach and the teen is the hero of their journey.
landing.smartInsightsDescription: Data-driven dashboard helping parents identify patterns and offer the right support at the right time.
landing.powerUpsDescription: BUFF uses a professional approach to strengthening executive functions to deliver personalized cognitive strategies exactly when your teen needs them.
landing.environmentDescription: Optimize your space for focus and reduce sensory distractions.
landing.focusDescription: Break overwhelming tasks into small achievements.
landing.energyDescription: Self-regulation techniques for managing energy and emotions.
landing.forParentsTitle: For Parents: Be the Coach, Not the Boss
landing.forParentsDescription: BUFF empowers parents with insights and strategies to support their teen's executive function development without micromanaging. Collaboration over control.
landing.patternDescription: Identify when and where difficulties occur to offer targeted support.
landing.coachingDescription: Get research-backed suggestions to support your teen.
landing.collaborativeDescription: Set rewards and milestones together as a team.
landing.joinFamilies: Join families turning daily routines into achievable victories.
landing.researchBacked: Based on Executive Function strengthening principles — research-backed cognitive strategies

legal.title: Legal Disclaimer
legal.disclaimer: Important Disclaimer: The Buff app is a technological tool for task management and organization, developed based on personal experience and tools from product management and parenting. The use of the app, including the "insights" it provides, is intended for enrichment and assistance purposes only and does not constitute a substitute for medical, psychological, diagnostic, or professional therapeutic advice. The app's creator is not a licensed therapist, doctor, or psychologist. For any questions regarding your child's physical or mental health, please consult qualified professionals. Use of the app is at the user's sole responsibility.

philosophy.title: The Buff Philosophy
philosophy.subtitle: A professional guide for parents - The philosophy behind the system
philosophy.intro: We know how challenging it is to raise a child with attention and focus difficulties. We've prepared a guide explaining the professional approach behind Buff - a system built in collaboration with experts, based on evidence-based Executive Functioning principles.
philosophy.tip: 💡 Tip: Share this page with partners, teachers, or therapists - so everyone understands the approach and knows how to support your child consistently.
philosophy.branding.title: The Name Buff - Empowerment
philosophy.branding.subtitle: Not a task list - a tool for empowerment
philosophy.branding.content: "Buff" in gaming is a bonus that powers up your character. We turn daily routines into adventures using the language kids love - quests, points, and a vault.
philosophy.branding.insight: Gaming language minimizes resistance and increases engagement in children with attention difficulties.
philosophy.rewards.title: Dopamine Bridge - Smart Rewards
philosophy.rewards.subtitle: Tiered rewards by Success Days
philosophy.rewards.content: Distant rewards don't motivate an ADHD brain. We built a tiered system - from small daily rewards to a fun day out after 10 success days.
philosophy.rewards.insight: Small, frequent rewards are more effective than one large distant reward.
philosophy.positive.title: Safe Harbor - Positive Only
philosophy.positive.subtitle: Safe environment without punishments
philosophy.positive.content: Your child can only earn points - never lose them. No deductions, no punishments. An incomplete task simply didn't earn points.
philosophy.positive.insight: Positive reinforcement builds self-confidence and long-term intrinsic motivation.
philosophy.bonus.title: Parent Bonus - The Invisible Effort
philosophy.bonus.subtitle: Recognizing hard work that isn't visible
philosophy.bonus.content: Staying focused, restraining impulses, overcoming urges - enormous effort that goes unrecorded. The "Daily Win Bonus" is your way to say: "I see you today."
philosophy.bonus.insight: The bonus serves as an "emotional bridge" and strengthens the child's sense of agency.
philosophy.dayTypes.title: Day Types - Energy Management
philosophy.dayTypes.subtitle: Auto-adjusts to day type
philosophy.dayTypes.content: Kids with ADHD "run a marathon while others sprint." The system auto-adjusts tasks for school days vs. rest days.
philosophy.dayTypes.insight: Adjusting expectations reduces cognitive load and prevents burnout.
philosophy.smartGoal.title: The 70% Goal - Winning Streak
philosophy.smartGoal.subtitle: Building success upon success
philosophy.smartGoal.content: We don't chase perfection. Reaching 70% is the real success that builds confidence and a winning streak.
philosophy.smartGoal.insight: Realistic goals are the key to preventing dropout.
philosophy.community.title: Buff: Turning Challenges into Wins
philosophy.community.insight: Questions, tips, and support from parents who understand the journey.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: The story behind Buff
about.creatorIntro: Hi, I'm Adi Elgart German - a product manager by day, but first and foremost a mom to Itai and Ami.
about.missionContent: Buff was born from deep research into Executive Functions and cognitive coaching, combined with my personal experience as a mom and product manager. I wanted to stop being the "task police" and become my kids' coach, using tools that truly speak their language.
about.philosophyContent: This app is not just a tech tool; it's our way of turning routine management into a game of empowerment, resilience building, and a sense of capability.
about.communityContent: I'm a big believer in the power of community. I'd love to hear from you, learn from your experience, and think together about how to make Buff better for all our children.
about.footer: 💜 Built with love, for parents and children
